description_long: This is a modern, rectangular table featuring a combination of materials and a distinctive design. The tabletop appears to be made of a transparent or frosted glass panel, supported by a sleek black metal frame with slatted elements beneath the glass. At one end of the table, there is an integrated wooden storage unit with a rich, dark wood grain finish and four visible drawers, providing both functionality and visual contrast. The legs of the table are angled and made of black metal, giving the piece a contemporary and sturdy appearance. The overall design is minimalist yet practical, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal spaces. The table's clean lines and mixed materials make it a striking centerpiece for modern settings.
description: A modern table with a glass top, black metal frame, and an integrated dark wood storage unit with drawers. The design is sleek, functional, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the wooden storage unit and the slatted black metal frame beneath the glass top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the four drawers of the wooden storage unit and the full width of the glass tabletop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the black metal frame and the transparent glass top, with the storage unit at the far end.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden storage unit and the glass tabletop extending outward.
